subject: feat(ui): add hamburger menu and quick guide tutorial modal
body:
Replace loose PDF/Install/Update buttons in the header with a
hamburger menu that groups secondary actions. Adds a 4-step Quick
Guide modal that auto-shows on first visit and is accessible anytime
from the menu.

Header now shows only 3 action elements: hamburger menu, filter
toggle, and settings gear — cleaner on all screen sizes.

Quick Guide steps:
1. Welcome — what the dashboard shows
2. Tabs — how to navigate between views
3. Filters — how to focus on specific data
4. View Level — how to change detail level

Tags: ui, ux, onboarding, mobile
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
